title: Smoky Beef Argentinian Stir-fry
description: A dense and smoky dish featuring ground beef in a rich sauce that's perfect for date nights or any night when you want to impress your guests with an authentic Argentine meal.

ingredients.name: Ground Beef
ingredients.notes: Ensure the ground beef is nut free.

ingredients.name: Chopped Onion
ingredients.notes: Chop finely for better flavor integration

ingredients.name: Garlic Cloves
ingredients.notes: Crush or chop into small pieces

ingredients.name: Chopped Tomato
ingredients.notes: Cherry tomatoes work well for this dish.

instructions: Heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add ground beef and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spatula. Remove from pan.
In the same pan, add garlic and onion (if using), sautéing for 2 minutes until fragrant.
Return ground beef to the pan along with chicken broth. Allow to simmer for about 5 minutes to let flavors meld together.
Add diced red bell pepper and chopped tomatoes. Stir well to combine all ingredients, allowing mixture to cook for an additional 5-7 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper as desired. Serve hot over rice or noodles.
